evals.name: delete-word-backward
evals.prompt: Verify Ctrl+Backspace deletes the previous word in an input/textarea.
evals.expected_output: Documentation excerpt showing deleteWordBackward() use and keybinding mapping

assertions.description: ref.current.deleteWordBackward() removes the preceding word from the buffer

evals.name: protect-word-with-word-joiner
evals.prompt: Protect the phrase 'long-identifier' from wrapping using WORD JOINER and verify wrap does not break it.
evals.expected_output: protectWords implementation and resulting buffer contains U+2060 between characters of target

assertions.description: Buffer contains U+2060 sequences where protection applied
